narrative:
Loudonville-Perrysville Ex Vill Sd (Ashland) exempted village school district has 5,074 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.7 percentage points.
